chapters.title: One Piece
chapters.summary: 'Omen' — Imu arrives at Aurust Castle in real form and attacks Zoro's group in the Western Village, slashing Gerd's fingers to free Sommers. Zoro counters with 'King of Hell: Onigiri' but Imu blocks with his tail and unleashes 'Omen', a black flame technique that strikes Zoro across the face leaving him bloody. Imu also uses Omen to revive Sommers and Killingham. The chapter ends with Loki confronting Imu.

chapters.title: Nano Machine
chapters.summary: Ongoing weekly manhwa serialization continues.

chapters.title: Solo Leveling: Ragnarok
chapters.summary: Series on hiatus since January 2026 after illustrator JIN departed for mandatory military service. Expected to return around May–June 2026 with a new artist from Redice Studios for Season 3.

chapters.title: Dandadan
chapters.summary: During a group outing, Okarun suggests meeting up with Momo and Jiji. Jiji reveals he has been secretly channeling ki into Momo to ease her chest pain, deepening the relationship dynamics between the main characters. Next chapter 232 scheduled for May 4, 2026.

chapters.title: Blue Lock
chapters.summary: 'Vivien Hugo' — Chapter spotlights French player Vivien Hugo in a pivotal new development during the ongoing match. Weekly serialization continues in Kodansha's Weekly Shonen Magazine.

chapters.title: Sakamoto Days
chapters.summary: 'Sebas vs Kippei' — Kippei tells Natsuki to stop resisting since he is Order-level. Natsuki attempts to escape with Mafuyu but Kippei stops them. While Natsuki tries to wake his brother, Kippei tends to Shiina who insists on killing the Seba brothers. Kippei receives a call that Sakamoto has woken and is clashing with Kei Uzuki; the Saionji siblings are ordered to JAA headquarters. Next chapter 257 expected April 27, 2026.

chapters.title: Jujutsu Kaisen
chapters.summary: Series concluded with final chapter 'From Now On'. The sequel manga 'Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo' also reached its final chapter 25 in March 2026.

chapters.title: Chainsaw Man
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 232, ending the Academy Saga (Part 2). Final Volume 24 releases June 4, 2026. Fans speculate a bonus Chapter 233 may accompany Volume 24.

chapters.title: Tower of God
chapters.summary: Season 3 concluded. Main series on hiatus awaiting Season 4 announcement. Spin-off 'Urek Mazino' ongoing with Chapter 59 released April 15, 2026.

chapters.title: Spy x Family
chapters.summary: Biweekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. Next chapter 134 expected around April 26, 2026.

chapters.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
chapters.summary: On indefinite hiatus since October 2025 due to health concerns for creators Yamada and Abe. No confirmed return date announced.

chapters.title: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint
chapters.summary: Ongoing weekly manhwa serialization continues. Chapter 305 released April 3 and Chapter 306 released April 8, 2026.

chapters.title: Eleceed
chapters.summary: Ongoing weekly manhwa serialization continues. Weekly updates on WEBTOON/Naver.

chapters.title: Return of the Blossoming Blade
chapters.summary: Ongoing manhwa serialization on WEBTOON (also known as Return of the Mount Hua Sect).

chapters.title: The Beginning After the End
chapters.summary: Ongoing webtoon adaptation continues. The light novel concluded in August 2025 at Chapter 529.

chapters.title: Kaiju No. 8
chapters.summary: Series completed with 129 chapters across 16 volumes. Anime 'Final Chapter' season by Production I.G is in production.

chapters.title: My Hero Academia
chapters.summary: Series concluded with Chapter 430 plus epilogue Chapter 431. A special anime episode adapting Ch. 431 'More' airs May 2, 2026 as part of the 10th anniversary celebration.

chapters.title: Vinland Saga
chapters.summary: Series concluded with final chapter 'Somewhere Not Here', ending Thorfinn's journey after nearly 20 years of publication.

chapters.title: Kingdom
chapters.summary: Ongoing serialization in Weekly Young Jump continues. Chapters in the 870s advancing the Western Zhao Invasion Arc. Next chapter expected May 5, 2026.

chapters.title: One Punch Man
chapters.summary: Part of the Neo Heroes Uprising Arc. Weekly serialization continues. Latest chapter released April 9, 2026.

chapters.title: WITCH WATCH
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Weekly Shonen Jump continues. Series has 25 volumes compiled as of March 2026.

chapters.title: Marriage Toxin
chapters.summary: Weekly serialization in Shonen Jump+ continues. Anime adaptation by Bones Film premiered April 7, 2026, airing Tuesdays at 7:30 a.m. on Fuji TV. Series has 17 tankōbon volumes with 1,000,000+ copies in circulation.
